Cursor Engineering Coach

Analyze and improve your Cursor IDE workflow. Practice scores, anti-pattern detection, and skill discovery — built exclusively for Cursor. Read-only. Zero telemetry.

Get Started Features GitHub

Dashboard

Practice scores, skill finder, daily activity charts, and workspace breakdowns at a glance.

Learn more →

Output Tracking

Measure Cursor-generated lines of code, request consumption, and model usage breakdowns.

Learn more →

Anti-Patterns

Detect bad habits with scored categories: prompt quality, session hygiene, code review, and tool mastery.

Learn more →

Activity Patterns

Work-hour heatmaps, calendar views, and per-project breakdowns of your coding sessions.

Learn more →

Learning Center

Personalized quizzes, coding challenges, and skill trees built from your actual usage data.

Learn more →

Achievements

Earn XP and unlock badges across Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Diamond tiers as you grow your Cursor skills.

Learn more →

See It in Action
